deviations.description: The requirement changed from prohibiting blood collection when the donor has recently undergone surgery OR received a blood transfusion (Version 1) to prohibiting it only when BOTH conditions are true (Version 2). The process model enforces the prohibition when either condition is true, which is stricter than Version 2. This results in non-compliance because the process denies blood collection in cases where Version 2 would allow it (i.e., when only one of the conditions is true).
process_model_reference: Exclusive Gateway 'Donor has recently undergone surgery or received a blood transfusion'

deviations.description: The process model routes donors to end the process if they have recently undergone surgery or received a blood transfusion, matching the Version 1 requirement. However, Version 2 only prohibits collection if both conditions are true. The process model does not allow blood collection when only one condition is true, which is not compliant with the new, less restrictive requirement.
